10100111111100010001111010000001011011001001001101010 - ASI: 24

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  01 = 0 * 1
  11 = 1 * 1
  010 = 01 * 0
  110 = 11 * 0
  0000 = 00 * 00
  0100 = 01 * 00
  0111 = 01 * 11
  1010 = 1 * 010
  00100 = 0 * 0100
  11110 = 11 * 110
  110110 = 110 * 110
  0000010 = 0000 * 010
  0100100 = 010 * 0100
  1101010 = 110 * 1010
  01111010 = 0111 * 1010
  10100111 = 1010 * 0111
  0000010110110 = 0000010 * 110110
  0010001111010 = 00100 * 01111010
  1010011111110 = 10100111 * 11110
  01001001101010 = 0100100 * 1101010
  10100111111100010001111010 = 1010011111110 * 0010001111010
  000001011011001001001101010 = 0000010110110 * 01001001101010
  10100111111100010001111010000001011011001001001101010 = 10100111111100010001111010 * 000001011011001001001101010
